title: brachiaria dictyoneura subsp. humidicola
intro: Brachiaria dictyoneura subsp. humidicola, also known as B. humidicola, is a plant species in the family Poaceae. It is an aquatic plant that grows in wetland environments and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide relief from various health issues, including skin infections, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders. In terms of herbal preparations, B. humidicola can be used in infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
